question: Will Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi still be alive by June 1st 2026?
reason: Abbas Araghchi's recent public appearances and diplomatic engagements indicate he is alive.
evidence: On May 6, 2026, Araghchi met with China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Beijing to discuss regional tensions. ([aljazeera.com](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/6/irans-araghchi-holds-talks-with-chinas-wang-yi-in-beijing?utm_source=openai))

On May 14, 2026, he participated in the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting in New Delhi, India. ([aljazeera.com](https://www.aljazeera.com/amp/news/2026/5/15/araghchi_iran_doubts_us_seriousness_about_talks_amid_nuclear_deadlock?utm_source=openai))

On May 15, 2026, he briefed India's Foreign Minister Subrahmanyam Jaishankar on the latest developments in the US-Israeli war on Iran. ([dawn.com](https://www.dawn.com/news/2000447?utm_source=openai))
